headline: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

site_brief.audience: busy executives who want a real personal assistant
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: busy executives who want a real personal assistant AI assistant
busy executives who want a real personal assistant personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for busy executives who want a real personal assistant

summary: A premium niche landing page for senior leaders who need a personal AI agent that actually operates computers, remembers repeated work through a computer-use cache, and reduces friction in daily executive workflows like inbox triage, board prep, CRM updates, and reporting. Includes a long-form executive field guide, concrete workflows, and compliant structured data.
